test.name: Detect broken foreign keys in subject_person_ids and timelines.person_ids
test.description: Covers the two structural broken-foreign-key variants beyond person_evidence that SKILL.md Step 2 lists. project.subject_person_ids is ['I1','I9'] and timelines[0].person_ids (t_001) is ['I1','I9']; I9 does not exist in tree.gedcomx.json, while I1 remains valid. The skill must surface a dangling-reference warning for BOTH locations, at the top.

judge_context: Should detect that project.subject_person_ids contains 'I9', which does not exist in tree.gedcomx.json
Should detect that timeline t_001's person_ids contains 'I9', which does not exist in tree.gedcomx.json
BOTH dangling references must be surfaced as warnings at the top of the report, not just one of them
Should recognize that I1 is still valid in both arrays — only the I9 reference is broken; do not flag I1 or claim the whole subject list / timeline is invalid
Should NOT modify either project file to remove I9 — read-only skill; flag for the user
